description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a dark wooden fixed stock and handguard, with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern rifles, and a prominent front sight post paired with a rear notch sight. The handguard and grip are accented with blue tape or fabric, suggesting field modifications for improved grip or identification. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a standard slotted flash hider. The overall finish is a mix of matte and glossy surfaces, with visible wear on the wood and metal, indicating use in rugged urban environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden stock, black metal body, blue tape accents, and a curved magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, blue tape on the handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, blue tape, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
